title: pyrrocoma crocea var. crocea
intro: Pyrrocoma crocea var. crocea, also known as the Golden Pyrrocoma, is a plant species in the sunflower family that is native to the western United States. The Golden Pyrrocoma has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of this plant include relieving digestive issues and skin irritations, as well as providing antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. Herbal preparations of the Golden Pyrrocoma include infusions, teas, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and wellness.
